## Automated Contract Review Checks

These are run by the Contract Review Checklist workflow on pull requests.

- [ ] Test coverage verification passes
- [ ] Style compliance passes
- [ ] Documentation presence check passes
- [ ] Security pattern validation passes
- [ ] Breaking change detection reviewed

## Manual Review Items

- [ ] Contract security checklist completed or waived with justification
- [ ] Access control and auth paths reviewed
- [ ] State migration impact reviewed
- [ ] Cross-contract callers reviewed for compatibility
- [ ] Public API and event changes documented
- [ ] Release notes or changelog updated when behavior changes
- [ ] Deployment or rollback considerations noted
